name: roundtable
description: Multi-persona discussions with your Claude agents. Convert any Claude agent into a rich persona and orchestrate collaborative conversations.
long_description:
Roundtable turns your Claude agents into distinctive personas that discuss topics together in a single conversation. Install agents, convert them into personas with unique voices and communication styles, then launch a multi-persona discussion on any topic.

**Features**
- Convert Claude agents into rich personas with tone of voice, principles, and identity
- Auto-select relevant personas based on your discussion topic
- Conversational format with short, punchy responses
- Exit summary with questions raised by each persona

tools.name: list_personas
tools.description: List all available roundtable personas with their metadata

tools.name: discover_agents
tools.description: Scan for Claude agents that can be converted to personas

tools.name: get_conversion_prompt
tools.description: Generate the conversion prompt for a specific Claude agent

tools.name: browse_agents
tools.description: Browse a GitHub repository to find Claude agents that can be imported as personas

tools.name: import_persona
tools.description: Fetch a Claude agent from a GitHub repo and generate the conversion prompt to create a persona directly

tools.name: save_persona
tools.description: Save a generated persona markdown file to disk

tools.name: refresh_manifest
tools.description: Rescan all persona files and rebuild the manifest from scratch

prompts.name: start-roundtable
prompts.description: Start a multi-persona roundtable discussion with all available personas
prompts.text: Start a roundtable discussion with the available personas. Optionally provide a topic to filter personas by expertise.
